title: Fog Settings Document
description: A Minecraft Bedrock Edition fog settings definition document. Fog settings control the appearance of fog in different environments including distance-based fog, volumetric fog density, and media coefficients for scattering and absorption effects.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this fog settings file. Use '1.16.100' or later.

minecraft:fog_settings.title: Fog Settings
minecraft:fog_settings.description:
The fog settings definition containing description, distance, and volumetric properties.

Properties:
• description ({ identifier })
• distance ({ air, water, lava, ... })
• volumetric (object)

defaultSnippets.label: Fog Settings Definition
defaultSnippets.description: The fog settings definition containing description, distance, and volumetric properties.
